steps.title: Calculate party hat expenses
steps.content: Vivian bought 10 packages at $3 each: $$10 \times 3 = 30$$ dollars spent on party hats.

steps.title: Find cupcake count from remaining budget
steps.content: Budget remaining for cupcakes: $$71 - 30 = 41$$ dollars. Since each cupcake costs \$1, she bought 41 cupcakes.
